mapper.sql: je.JOB_EXECUTION_ID, je.VERSION, je.JOB_INSTANCE_ID, ji.JOB_NAME, je.CREATE_TIME, je.START_TIME, je.END_TIME, je.STATUS, je.EXIT_CODE, je.EXIT_MESSAGE, je.LAST_UPDATED
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION WHERE STATUS = 'COMPLETED' OR EXIT_CODE = 'COMPLETED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION WHERE STATUS = 'FAILED' OR EXIT_CODE = 'FAILED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION WHERE STATUS IN ('STARTING', 'STARTED') OR END_TIME IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION WHERE (STATUS = 'FAILED' OR EXIT_CODE = 'FAILED') AND CREATE_TIME >= #{fromDateTime}
SELECT ji.JOB_NAME FROM BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION je JOIN BATCH_JOB_INSTANCE ji ON je.JOB_INSTANCE_ID = ji.JOB_INSTANCE_ID ORDER BY je.JOB_EXECUTION_ID DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT
FROM BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION je JOIN BATCH_JOB_INSTANCE ji ON je.JOB_INSTANCE_ID = ji.JOB_INSTANCE_ID ORDER BY je.JOB_EXECUTION_ID DESC OFFSET 0 ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT START_TIME, END_TIME FROM BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION WHERE START_TIME IS NOT NULL AND END_TIME IS NOT NULL ORDER BY JOB_EXECUTION_ID DESC OFFSET 0 ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT
FROM BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION je JOIN BATCH_JOB_INSTANCE ji ON je.JOB_INSTANCE_ID = ji.JOB_INSTANCE_ID ORDER BY je.JOB_EXECUTION_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT
FROM BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION je JOIN BATCH_JOB_INSTANCE ji ON je.JOB_INSTANCE_ID = ji.JOB_INSTANCE_ID WHERE COALESCE(je.START_TIME, je.CREATE_TIME) >= #{startDateTime} AND COALESCE(je.START_TIME, je.CREATE_TIME) < #{endDateTime} ORDER BY je.JOB_EXECUTION_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT
FROM BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION je JOIN BATCH_JOB_INSTANCE ji ON je.JOB_INSTANCE_ID = ji.JOB_INSTANCE_ID WHERE je.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' OR je.EXIT_CODE = 'COMPLETED' ORDER BY je.JOB_EXECUTION_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT
FROM BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION je JOIN BATCH_JOB_INSTANCE ji ON je.JOB_INSTANCE_ID = ji.JOB_INSTANCE_ID WHERE je.STATUS = 'FAILED' OR je.EXIT_CODE = 'FAILED' ORDER BY je.JOB_EXECUTION_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT
FROM BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION je JOIN BATCH_JOB_INSTANCE ji ON je.JOB_INSTANCE_ID = ji.JOB_INSTANCE_ID WHERE je.STATUS IN ('STARTING', 'STARTED') OR je.END_TIME IS NULL ORDER BY je.JOB_EXECUTION_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT
FROM BATCH_JOB_EXECUTION je JOIN BATCH_JOB_INSTANCE ji ON je.JOB_INSTANCE_ID = ji.JOB_INSTANCE_ID WHERE (je.STATUS = 'FAILED' OR je.EXIT_CODE = 'FAILED') AND je.CREATE_TIME >= #{fromDateTime} ORDER BY je.JOB_EXECUTION_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
